CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2019 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kelly collins, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF JAMES SALES' COMPLAINT.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to Plaintiff James Sales' complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
